mission.title: valkey: Integrate the bugfixes of Redis 7.2.5
mission.description: Integrate the bugfixes of Redis 7.2.5. This issue affects 5+ users.

steps.title: Identify valkey troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your valkey installation:
```bash
valkey-server --version
valkey-cli ping
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review valkey configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant valkey configuration:
Redis 7.2.5 has been published: https://github.com/redis/redis/releases/tag/7.2.5

This release uses the "old" Redis license.

Please integrate the bugfixes of this release into Valkey.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Integrate the bugfixes of Redis 7.2.5
steps.description:
I think for safety reasons (or for better conflict resolution), the release branch should be arranged by core-team members since in think we won't review it very carefully sometimes.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Integrate the bugfixes of Redis 7.2.5 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test valkey to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: I think for safety reasons (or for better conflict resolution), the release branch should be arranged by core-team members since in think we won't review it very carefully sometimes.

prerequisites.description: A working valkey installation or development environment.
